data.title: debug-everything does not run a build to see if the build process succeeds
data.description: The /dso:debug-everything workflow validates tests and linting but does not run the build process. If a code change breaks compilation (e.g. a TypeScript error, a Python import error, or a broken package.json build script), debug-everything will mark validation as passed while the build fails silently. This means broken builds can slip through the fix pipeline without detection.
